---
title: "Catharina Yonge"
---

## Catharina Yonge

**Dates:** (1753-1842)

**Maiden name:** (Crawley)

### Description

paternal grandmother of CMY

### Biography

She married (1777) the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Cornwood.  She was daughter of Sir Thomas Crawley Boevey, 2nd Bt. (1745-1818).

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st 1864
- Letter from March 28th 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
